objectives.description_en: Plant the Bison vs Undertaker poster in the living quarters at the Scav base on Customs
objectives.description_ko: 세관에 있는 스캐브 기지의 숙소 구역에 'Bison vs Undertaker' 포스터를 설치하라
objectives.description_ja: Customsのスカブ基地の居住区に「Bison vs Undertaker」のポスターを設置する
